query:
WITH live_gates AS (
                    SELECT concurrency_gate_id AS id
                    FROM v2_job_queue
                    WHERE running = false AND concurrency_gate_id IS NOT NULL
                    GROUP BY concurrency_gate_id
                    HAVING MAX(concurrency_gated_at) >= NOW() - $2::interval
                )
                SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE overdue AND g.id IS NULL) AS ungated_count,
                       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE overdue AND g.id IS NOT NULL) AS gated_count,
                       MIN(q.scheduled_for) FILTER (WHERE overdue AND g.id IS NULL)
                           AS oldest_ungated,
                       MIN(q.scheduled_for) FILTER (WHERE overdue) AS oldest_overdue
                FROM (
                    SELECT scheduled_for, concurrency_gate_id,
                           scheduled_for <= NOW() - $2::interval AS overdue
                    FROM v2_job_queue
                    WHERE tag = $1 AND running = false
                ) q
                LEFT JOIN live_gates g ON g.id = q.concurrency_gate_id
